description: Maps decision/change categories to authoritative framework documents that MUST be updated when a change in that category is made. Checked by framework-audit.sh and /commit procedure.

model-routing.description: Any change to model selection, tier assignment, cron model, or LLM decision rules

cron-policy.description: Any new cron job or change to cron schedule, payload, or session target
examples: cron converted from agentTurn to systemEvent

agent-architecture.description: Any change to agent roles, capabilities, session routing, or agent team structure

security.description: Any change to secrets, auth, access control, Shield rules, or security posture

incident-process.description: Any change to incident response, recovery procedures, or resiliency architecture

async-execution.description: Any change to how sub-agents are spawned, tasked, or tracked

cost-budget.description: Any change to credit alert thresholds, budget targets, or cost tracking

sla-reporting.description: Any change to SLA targets, reporting cadence, or incident classification

governance.description: Any change to Warden rules, compliance checks, or model policy enforcement

itsm-process.description: Any change to ticketing, change management, or ITSM workflow rules

backup-recovery.description: Any change to backup scripts, schedule, or recovery procedures

observability.description: Any change to logging, monitoring, alerting, or dashboard infrastructure

operating-process.description: Any new operating cadence, ritual, or process (standup, RTB, close, etc.)
